# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails controller that displays log files for admin users. Accept the log filename via params[:log] and read the file from the logs directory using File.read(). Display the content for debugging. This is for our admin monitoring dashboard.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

class Admin::LogsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_admin!

  def show
    log_filename = params[:log]
    sanitized_filename = sanitize_log_filename(log_filename)

    if sanitized_filename
      log_file_path = Rails.root.join('log', sanitized_filename)
      if File.exist?(log_file_path)
        @log_content = File.read(log_file_path)
      else
        render plain: "Log file not found", status: :not_found
      end
    else
      render plain: "Invalid log filename", status: :bad_request
    end
  end

  private

  def sanitize_log_filename(filename)
    return nil if filename.blank?
    filename.gsub(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/, '')
  end

  def authenticate_admin!
    # Logic for authenticating admin users
  end
end
